title: Pandemonium
body:
**This is a forge based modpack mainly made for friends and my server, but free for anyone to use and enjoy!**

This pack includes many mods (200+) so you can expect to find a way to play with your own playstyle!

There's plenty of combat, exploration, bosses, and more! We have multiple decoration mods and mods that include special blocks perfect for building whatever you need, many mods dedicated to making your combat experience feel unique and engaging, different types of creatures to befriend, tons of opportunities to customize your character to make it feel unique to you, or if you prefer looting dungeons, we got you covered there too! Go from collecting Pets, to being a wizard of mass destruction, its up to you! **Mods you can look forward to** - Origins - Figura - Artifacts - Better Combat - Bonfires - Simply Swords - And 200+ more!
Requested Credits - [Macaws mods](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/sketch_macaw/projects)
